Name: Platinum 10" Flat Finishing Box (PT-10FB)
Description:
Platinum 10" Flat Finishing Box (PT-10FB) provides professional-grade efficiency for drywall contractors seeking consistent, high-speed joint finishing. This tool is engineered to apply joint compound and feather edges on both flat and butt joints in a single, fluid pass, significantly reducing manual labor and the requirement for extensive post-application sanding. Its robust construction ensures it holds up to the demands of daily job site use while maintaining the precision necessary for high-quality results.

The unit features an integrated crown adjustment dial, allowing for granular control over the volume of compound dispensed. This versatility enables contractors to easily adapt the thickness of the application to suit the specific requirements of base coats or final touch-ups. A high-performance pivoting axle is incorporated into the design, ensuring the blade maintains optimal contact with the wall surface even when encountering minor irregularities, resulting in uniform coverage across every seam.

Features:

  • Precision Dispensing: Automatically regulates the volume of joint compound for a consistent, professional finish on every pass.
  • Integrated Feathering: Simultaneously applies and feathers edges on flat and butt joints to maximize productivity.
  • Adjustable Crown Dial: Offers precise control over compound thickness, accommodating different stages of the finishing process.
  • Pivoting Axle Design: Enhances maneuverability and ensures the blade maintains consistent contact with uneven wall surfaces.
  • Durable Construction: Built with high-quality materials to withstand the rigors of professional, daily job site environments.

Name: Platinum 2" Nail Spotter (PT-2NS)

It is engineered to deliver a consistent, uniform finish that minimizes the need for subsequent sanding, ensuring a high-quality, paint-ready surface on every project.

Constructed from durable, anodized aluminum, the tool balances structural integrity with a lightweight profile, making it suitable for demanding, high-volume job site environments. The design incorporates a precision-hardened steel blade for clean, flush results and a high-performance urethane door seal that maintains consistent internal pressure while preventing compound leakage. A smooth-glide wheel system ensures steady tracking across wall surfaces, providing the control necessary for professional-grade results.

Features:
